name: Center
summary: A `Stack` that centers its children on BOTH axes (`align='center'` + `justify='center'`) — the one-shot answer to "center this in its space". Both defaults are overridable; set `direction='row'` to center a row instead of a column.

bestPractices: Use for hero blocks, empty states, spinners, and any "center the content" case instead of hand-rolling align/justify.
Give Center a height (or `fullWidth`/`grow`) so there is space to center within; on its own it is content-sized.
Override `align`/`justify` to center on a single axis when needed.
